At this point, I’m just imagining all the different random things LeBron could be waiting on before he makes his decision.

World Cup ☑️
End of Summer League ☑️
Seeing The Odyssey in IMAX 70mm ◽️
Women’s Equality Day ◽️
September◽️
Start of training camp ◽️
Dune Part 3 ◽️

items.title: The Los Angeles Clippers and Jamarion Sharp have agreed to a two-way deal, agent Scott Nichols of Rize Management told HoopsHype. Sharp was last year’s G League Defensive Player of the Year and blocks leader (4.1). With Yanic Konan Niederhauser hurt, Sharp adds frontcourt depth.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Los Angeles Clippers and Jamarion Sharp have agreed to a two-way deal, agent Scott Nichols of Rize Management told HoopsHype. Sharp was last year’s G League Defensive Player of the Year and blocks leader (4.1). With Yanic Konan Niederhauser hurt, Sharp adds frontcourt depth.

items.body_excerpt:
ICYMI: A chance for Celtics fans to get to know Dillon Mitchell.

From his fashion sense to what shows he watches, and what a basketball journey where he repeatedly had to start from scratch taught him about himself.

“Adapt and be a leader."

items.title: Tempo all-star Marina Mabrey to take part in WNBA three-point shooting contest Friday as part of all-star weekend festivities. She's up against Portland's Chatham native Bridget Carleton, Rhyne Howard of Atlanta,  Dallas's Azzi Fudd, Natisha Hiedeman of Seattle and Janelle Salaün
items.author: Doug Smith
items.body_excerpt: Tempo all-star Marina Mabrey to take part in WNBA three-point shooting contest Friday as part of all-star weekend festivities. She's up against Portland's Chatham native Bridget Carleton, Rhyne Howard of Atlanta,  Dallas's Azzi Fudd, Natisha Hiedeman of Seattle and Janelle Salaün of Golden State.
